title: Interactive maps of lighthouses
author: Rob Beschizza
summary:
Lighthouses of the Northern Seas is a beautiful map of glimmering coastlines at night, a cloudless world where everything but the lighthouses are turned off.

It shows 23,217 lights, separated into white, red, green and yellow, with their flash pattern (fixed, steady, quick, occulting) and options to show "major" lights only and the visibility ranges. — Read the r
